seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The second paragraph must approve the vacation days.
new_constraint: Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The second paragraph must approve the vacation days. Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Vacation Request

Dear [Employee Name],

I hope you are having a productive week. I am writing to formally acknowledge receipt of your vacation request submitted on [Date] for the period of [Start Date] to [End Date]. We have reviewed your current workload and team schedule to ensure a smooth transition during your absence.

While we have noted your request and will proceed with the necessary handover planning, we are unable to approve the specific dates you have selected at this time due to an unexpected surge in project deadlines that requires your presence. We will discuss alternative dates that better align with our operational needs during our upcoming one-on-one meeting next week.

Thank you for your understanding and flexibility as we navigate this busy period. Please let me know if you have any questions or need further clarification regarding the rescheduling process.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]
